description_long: This object is a light machine gun-style rifle with a long, slender black barrel and a prominent wooden stock and handguard. The rifle features a bipod attached near the muzzle, allowing for stabilized firing from a prone or supported position. A detachable box magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, and the trigger assembly is clearly visible. The rear of the rifle has a fixed wooden stock, ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, while the front handguard is also made of wood, providing a comfortable grip. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver for aiming. The overall construction combines metal and wood, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance suitable for military or paramilitary use.
description: A long, black metal rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, equipped with a bipod and a detachable box magazine. Features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, bipod, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bipod legs, the circular muzzle, and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, bipod, and box magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the bipod legs and barrel.
